markets.rules_primary: If Royce Lewis records 2+ hits in the Minnesota vs Baltimore professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 26, 2026 at 3:05 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Royce Lewis is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Royce Lewis starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Royce Lewis is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Royce Lewis is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.
